meaning: n.(涂油漆,涂药等)抹刀,压舌板
examples: I still have a cherished photo of him in his apron, standing over the grill, spatula in hand, smiling.
The spike might have helped in extracting meat from snails, a popular Roman food, and the spatula invoking sauce out of narrow-necked bottles.
Use a rubber spatula to scoop the purée into the prepared tin and leave to set for at least 6 hours or overnight.
Switch to a rubber spatula, scrape down the bowl and stir in the chopped chocolate.
Divide the batter evenly between the two pans and smooth the tops with the rubber spatula.
